channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: d35481f7-cda1-4fa2-8344-5a21f7f3724d
Display name: Entra Customer Lockbox Approver
Description: Can approve customer lockbox requests for accessing customer data in Entra ID.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/d35481f7-cda1-4fa2-8344-5a21f7f3724d
